HomePage.title: NaijaNeed
HomePage.mission: Aggregate civic needs to connect them to solutions.

SubmitPage.title: Share Your Need
SubmitPage.disclaimer: By submitting, you agree that your anonymised data can be shared with partners to provide solutions.
SubmitPage.confirmDetails: Confirm your details or update them above.
SubmitPage.enterPhoneForReset: Enter your phone number to receive a reset code.
SubmitPage.enterOtpHint: Enter the 6-digit code sent to your phone and choose a new password.
SubmitPage.enterPinToReset: Enter your Backup PIN to reset your password.

Dashboard.title: My Needs History
Dashboard.noNeeds: You haven't shared any needs yet.
Dashboard.noNeedsHint: Tap the button below to tell us what you need.
Dashboard.passwordHint: Add a password to your account to prevent unauthorized access from other devices.

Common.networkError: Network error. Please check your internet connection.
Common.submissionSuccess: Your need has been successfully submitted!
Common.submissionError: There was an error submitting your need. Please try again.
Common.loginError: Invalid phone number or password. Please try again.
Common.invalidpassword: The password you entered is incorrect. Please try again.
Common.passwordRequired: Please enter your password to continue.
Common.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 4 characters long.
Common.passwordsDoNotMatch: Passwords do not match. Please check and try again.
Common.resetCodeSent: A reset code has been sent to your phone.
Common.errorSendingCode: Failed to send reset code. Please try again.
Common.passwordResetSuccess: Password reset successfully! You are now logged in.
Common.resetError: Failed to reset password. Please check the PIN/OTP or wait for the lockout period.
Common.pinTooShort: Backup PIN must be exactly 6 digits.
Common.accountLocked: Too many failed attempts. Your account has been temporarily locked for security.

messages: 📢 New arrival: Support for small businesses is now live in 5 states!
🎁 Bonus: Register today and get priority review for your submissions.
⚡ Update: 50+ new boreholes commissioned this week across Nigeria.
🌟 Tip: Detailed descriptions help us find the right solution faster.
